title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. declinatum
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. declinatum, also known as the decline-star of Bethlehem, is a variety of the Ornithogalum umbellatum plant, which belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum var. declinatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as a natural expectorant to clear congestion from the lungs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and to promote overall well-being.
